82389153.title: England Lions cricket team against Pakistan Shaheens in the UAE in 2025–26

pageprops.defaultsort: England Lions cricket team against Pakistan Shaheens in the UAE in 2025–26

82389153.extract: The England Lions cricket team is touring United Arab Emirates (UAE) from 20 February to 9 March 2026 to play against Pakistan Shaheens. The tour consists of three Twenty20 (T20s) matches and five unofficial One Day Internationals (ODIs). All the matches are being played at Sheikh Zayed Cricket Stadium in Abu Dhabi.
